title: Exploring Opportunities Towards One Trillion Dollar Economy - FinancialEDGE
description: Abuja hosted the 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar, bringing together industry experts and stakeholders to discuss the theme "Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy." Anthonia Ezenwa Ekezie, a member of the Corporate Communication Team at the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), and Odume
html:
Abuja hosted the 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar, bringing together industry experts and stakeholders to discuss the theme “Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy.”

Anthonia Ezenwa Ekezie, a member of the Corporate Communication Team at the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director at Financial Edge, were among the attendees.

The seminar provided a platform for discussions on the role of banking recapitalization in driving Nigeria’s economic growth and achieving its ambitious goal of becoming a one-trillion-dollar economy.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Anthonia Ezenwa Ekezie, Corporate Communication Team member Central Bank Of Nigeria (CBN) and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director, Financial Edge  at the 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar in Abuja, with the theme: “Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy.
